warmup16.text: 彩虹之所以有多种颜色，是因为阳光（白光）被空气中的水滴折射、反射

decode64.text: In mixture-of experts (MoE) inference, the model's efficiency hinges on routing each input token to only a subset of expert sub-networks. However, this sparse activation creates a critical bottleneck: **GPU communication overhead**. Unlike dense models where all parameters reside on every GPU, MoE often shards experts across multiple
